AI.title: Apple’s Camera Chief Thinks AI Can Give You Superpowers

科技.summary: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

科技.summary: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the  risk of outright fraud.

科技.summary: Members of the program, called "Waymo Premier," will have to pony up $29.99 per month.
